title: Project Manager
required_skills: Degree or master craftsman qualification in building services or electrical engineering
Minimum 2 years project management in building services plant construction
Proven ability to manage cross-trade projects
Independent work style and excellent communication skills
matched_skills: Project management and coordination experience (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd, ECE Group)
Cross-functional team collaboration and stakeholder communication
Budget and timeline monitoring (HSBC programme governance)
Project management tool proficiency — JIRA, Confluence
missing_skills: Building services or electrical engineering degree/qualification
Building services plant construction project experience
Cross-trade project management (HVAC, electrical, plumbing etc.)
core_responsibilities: Lead and coordinate projects in building services engineering sector
Develop and review technical concepts, plans and tender documents
Manage and monitor project timelines, budgets and progress
Collaborate with architects, specialist planners, subcontractors and clients
Ensure quality assurance and compliance with standards and regulations
Support bid preparation and cost calculations
recommended_emphasis: Project coordination and timeline/budget tracking capabilities (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd)
Cross-functional stakeholder management and communication skills
summary: Boru scores 21.4 (poor match) as this role requires specialist building services or electrical engineering qualifications and hands-on experience in plant construction project management — a technical domain entirely outside Boru's background. General PM coordination skills are transferable but insufficient to overcome the hard qualification requirement for a technical engineering PM role. Application is not recommended.
